item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: {"change_summary":"Moved the sulfur-content note slightly upward within the local scope to separate it from the trap-energy label.","replacement_utf8":"  \\node[small note, anchor=west] at (0.26,3.70) {increasing sulfur content};"}
